game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Players drive a heavily armored vehicle through a zombie-infested, side-scrolling apocalyptic landscape, aiming to reach a distant safe zone while managing fuel and vehicle damage. Core gameplay involves accelerating, braking, and activating weapons via on-screen buttons, strategically plowing through hordes of zombies and destructible obstacles.
game_info.description: Navigate your armored vehicle through a zombie-infested wasteland to reach the safe zone 3000 meters away. Plow through zombies and obstacles while managing your fuel gauge and vehicle integrity. Your vehicle takes damage from collisions - lose all armor and it's game over. Collect fuel pickups to keep moving. The faster you hit zombies, the more points you score!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Right / D: Accelerate forward
Arrow Left / A: Brake/Reverse
Space: Fire machine gun (clears zombies ahead)
Arrow Up / W: Boost (uses extra fuel for speed burst)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart (from game over screen)
